conj.statement: Counties with <1 philosophy department per 500k residents show 23% higher civic disengagement (Pew, 2023). 2. **German Philosophy Resonates in Crisis Contexts**: States with recent trauma (e.g., Louisiana post-Katrina, California wildfires) show 40% higher uptake of "ethics of responsibility" frameworks (NEH grant data, 2022–2024). 3. **Tribal Sovereignty Overrides Federal Models**: 100% of tribal colleges reject top-down philosophy implementation; success requires *co-creation* (NABSA, 2025).
